ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species (e.g., Cattle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species characteristics */,
  "genetic_info" TEXT /* Genetic information or links to genetic data */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the species entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the species entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue type */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue (e.g., Adipose, Bone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue characteristics */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Anatomical location of the tissue in the animal */,
  "biological_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the tissue */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tissue entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tissue entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tissue entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tissue entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Lipid Extraction) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test procedure */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the test */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the test */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_tests_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pH_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pH measurement */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the pH measurement */,
  "pH_value" REAL /* pH value recorded */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure pH */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the measurement */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the measurement entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the measurement entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pH_measurements_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tissue data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biochemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biochemical property */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue for which the property is measured */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the biochemical property (e.g., fat content) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the biochemical property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the biochemical property */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to measure the property */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the measurement method */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the property entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the property entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the project entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the project entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
